source.title: NPNF2-06. Jerome: The Principal Works of St. Jerome
NPNF2-06. Jerome: The Principal Works of St. Jerome

verses.text: Augustine asks Præsidius to forward the preceding letter to Jerome and also to write himself to urge him to forgive Augustine.
